text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day before tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm so sorry for stopping you, but I'm in search of someone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki informs me that she can't find one of the students under
her care. Unfortunately, I have no idea where to look...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. I haven't seen her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well, thank you anyway. If you do happen to find her, would
you tell her to contact me right away?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No need to say how—every member of Ritto dorm knows my details.
Thank you again! Now, I must be off.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Junior A
text_block_list.text: Hey, wasn't that Fuji? I wonder why she was in such a hurry.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Junior B
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, a student from Ritto hasn't been seen all day. I heard she
might've snuck off and run away from school.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well, that's not super rare, huh... Wait, so Fuji's been looking
since morning?! The tryouts are tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Junior Student B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I wonder if she'll be able to train at all... But it's her
we're talking about. I'm sure she'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Try as I might to find a student fitting the description Fuji gave me,
my search ends in failure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, it's already grown dark outside.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! What on earth are you doing here? And you're drenched in
sweat...
choice_data_list: I wanted to help with the search.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Is that so? You're very kind... Thank you for helping out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm afraid to say, this park is the only place left unchecked—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Junior C
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wait! Did you hear that? Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, my darling pony. And what might you be doing in such
a lonely place?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Junior C
text_block_list.text:
Huh? F-Fuji?! But, why are you here?! You should be preparing for
your race tomorrow, not worrying about me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I needn't worry about you? Why would you say such a thing? I mean,
you're one of my dearest friends at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student C
text_block_list.text:
No way! I... I'm no good to anyone here. I'm not fit to be at this school
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Junior Student C
text_block_list.text:
The training's way too hard for me. I just wanna see my family... All my
motivation to race disappeared like a puff of smoke!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Your motivation to race... I see.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want to try reclaiming that feeling? Or would you rather
throw this all away and go home?

text_block_list.name: Junior Student C
text_block_list.text: I-I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Junior C
text_block_list.text: I mean, I'd like to get the feeling back, if I can... Running in real races has always been my dream, but—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Then it's decided! If that is your wish, then I shall make it come true.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Watch me—I'll have you remember your motivation. All of it. In the
tryouts tomorrow, I'll show you a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Junior Student C
text_block_list.text: A miracle?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I mean it. So come on... let's get back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through an inspiring promise of a miracle, Fuji Kiseki manages to
bring the student safely home.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Geez... My nerves are shot, Fuji. I thought we lost you too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Forgive me! But I thank you, Hishiama, for watching over
things while I was gone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And Trainer, your efforts were heartening to see!
choice_data_list: I'm just glad we found your friend.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it's almost lights-out. Get to bed already. You've got that
race tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You missed a whole day of training, but I wouldn't sweat it. It'd take
more than a day to throw you out of shape. Just concentrate on restin'
up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Will do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Don't get any funny ideas or anything, 'kay? Good night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes, good night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I part ways with the two and return to my room, but I can't help
worrying about how Fuji was acting...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
For I am Fuji Kiseki—the entertainer who brings joy to all! At least,
that is the ideal I wish to become.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll put on a miracle of a performance that will make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: For I... am the miracle of the turf, Fuji Kiseki!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Watch me—I'll have you remember your motivation. All of it. In the
tryouts tomorrow, I'll show you a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants so badly to entertain and thrill people. I hope she's staying
calm about this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unable to shake my strange hunch, I go to make sure Fuji's resting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What a jerk! She looked too calm—I knew she'd do somethin' dumb
like this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you. You're that trainer who was with Fuji, aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, only her drivin' me into a rage! She vanished without a trace. It's
one thing for the others to break curfew, but a dorm leader?
Unforgivable!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's good that you're here, though—we're after the same thing. Let's
split up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Lemme think where she loves to train... There's down by the river, the
shrine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thinking of all the places she could be, Hishi Amazon and I split
up to look for Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh... T-Trainer?!
